title: Pearl of the South Pacific
writer: Jesse Lasky Jr., Talbot Jennings, Anna Hunger
actors: Virginia Mayo, Dennis Morgan, David Farrar
plot: Two beachcombers with a yacht join woman-with-a-past Rita on a quest for black pearls on a secret island. Arrived, they find another white man has made himself high priest; but George, the latter's handsome son, is fair game for R...
